Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The stakes continue to climb as Green Light Sights rewards one top shooter with their very own custom weapon—proof that precision pays off. But there's no time to celebrate. Bear Arms ups the ante by issuing defense vests to every contestant, with one hard rule: once it’s on, it stays on. From grueling mission briefings to body armor plank challenges that push endurance to the brink, the weight—literally and mentally—never lets up. Still armored, the team reports to Ken Shamrock for another brutal dose of Lion’s Den physical punishment. Just when they think they’ve caught a break, Compliant Technologies’ infamous glove makes a shocking return to torment a fresh round of contestants. And as the day winds down, Don introduces the team to his personal “Flights” challenge—an unforgiving test no one is excited to take on. It all ends with a sobering CIA reminder: in the field, your backstory might just save your life—or end it.

programme.desc:
Locked On HBCU host Darrion "Mouth of the South" Gray breaks down all of the sports news around the HBCU landscape. Darrion, a Texas Southern alum and former TSU Herald sports editor, is dedicated to giving a fair and in-depth look at all the talent across HBCU sports—not just the big schools like Southern University, Grambling University, and Alabama A&M. It's easy to get updates on Deion Sanders and Jackson State, but this is the only daily podcast breaking it all down across the entirety of HBCUs, from SWAC to MEAC to SIAC, CIAA, GCAC, and those outside of the traditional HBCU conferences like Tennessee State, Hampton, and North Carolina A&T. From the Bayou Classic to the Tuskegee Morehouse Classic and from 0 to the 5th, Locked On HBCU has you covered.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.desc: Two sisters made a little shack into a must-visit restaurant known for one dish: cortadillo stew

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati tries food at each stadium with the teams’ stars to determine who wins in the battle of tortas vs tacos

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Irving Quiroz wrote a book on Mexican bread. Pati visits to learn his secret to making the perfect campechana

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: The Garza family invites Pati to their vineyard to help the community make piloncillo – and it’s hard work!

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Gaby Molinar owns an urban farm dedicated to providing Monterrey with nutritious, diverse local ingredients.

programme.title: Edible Nutmeg: On the Road
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Plum hits the road with Edible Nutmeg, visiting Litchfield's newest homegrown distillery. Drinks are shared and gin chicken wings are on the grill for this summer-ready exploration of local food and drink!

programme.title: Road Trip Angler
programme.desc: Jameson Redding visits Idaho’s St. Joe River, a pristine mountain waterway set amid striking wilderness and classic northwestern scenery.

programme.title: Adventure All Stars
programme.desc: Adventure All Stars is the world’s only socially conscious travel show – an inspiring series that combines adventure and philanthropy. Cast members travel to secret locations, to uncover the best and most exciting experiences on the planet! Pre-filming...

programme.title: Scotland Revealed
programme.desc: Scotland Revealed - This series celebrates Scotland's stunning landscapes and landmarks from the air

programme.title: Authentic Escapes
programme.desc: In this episode, Sandra McLemore invites you to experience Austria like never before—through its royal palaces, charming villages, and centuries-old traditions. Wander through Schönbrunn Palace after hours, uncovering secret passageways, regal ballroom...

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos
programme.desc: Roy Rogers finds himself elected sheriff in a wild Texas town after the Civil War. But can Roy handle a place under martial law? And can he save Gabby Hayes from being executed? And how many songs will he get to sing? Clear the burrs from your saddle a...

programme.title: New Mexico
programme.desc: What happens when Abraham Lincoln himself comes to New Mexico to discuss a treaty with Native American chief Acoma (Ted de Corsia)? Can the hotbed of emotions be quieted by cavalry Captain Hunt (Lew Ayres)? Or will the Captains superiors insist on prov...

programme.title: Song of Arizona
programme.desc: This Roy Rogers adventure finds Gabby Whitaker (Gabby Hayes) running a ranch for wayward boys. One of the boys uses stolen money to help Gabby pay off his debts, but things unravel when the boys father, a notorious outlaw named King Blaine, is murdered...

programme.title: Hands Across The Border
programme.desc: Roy Rogers and Trigger star in this Republic Pictures western about horse breeders vying for a contract with the U.S. Army. The cast also includes such favorites as Onslow Stevens and Guinn Big Boy Williams, while songs include Hey Hey (It's a Great Da...

programme.title: Public Cowboy No. 1
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Smiley Burnette are back, and this time theyre dealing with some very modern thinking rustlers. These new criminals have taken up the latest technologies to outsmart the authorities, including shortwave radios and airplanes! Can Gene and...

programme.title: Part II - The Forge
programme.desc: Gideon's mustang drive encounters problems. Agostina must fend off the unwanted advances of cowboys.

programme.title: Part III - The Legacy
programme.desc: Clara's ranch meets an fiery fate, and she decides to join with Gideon.

programme.title: Part IV - The Passing
programme.desc: A range war is erupting in Montana. Call settles issues with Dunnegan and Newt. Cherokee Jack runs amok.

programme.title: Part I - Leaving
programme.desc: Two former Texas Rangers decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: Part II - On The Trail
programme.desc: McCrae and Wood's cattle drive faces deadly situations.

programme.title: Pat Garrett and Billy the Kid
programme.desc: Garrett, an aging outlaw, becomes a sheriff and has to hunt down his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark McCain settle near North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two tough hired hands beat up Lucas and burn his ranch to get him to move off his land.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: A young robber follows his stallion to Gene's ranch and a better life.

programme.title: The Gene Autry Show
programme.desc: The murder of an old friend sets Autry on the trail of a vicious outlaw, the Gray Dude.

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 34: The Naomi Kaylor Story
programme.desc: A former cabaret entertainer joins the wagon train, hoping to escape her past reputation and start a respectable new life in the West. Her attempt at reinvention is jeopardized when a man from her previous life arrives in the camp, threatening to expose her history to the other passengers and destroy the future she is trying to build

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1E4 - Lucas Helps The Town Drunk Sober Up
programme.desc: When a local alcoholic is falsely accused of a crime he did not commit, Lucas McCain steps in to defend him. Lucas works to help the man sober up and reclaim his dignity, ultimately aiding the local marshal in uncovering the truth and ensuring that justice is served for the town's downtrodden resident

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E 3 - End of A Young Gun
programme.desc: Lucas McCain takes in a young, rebellious drifter named Michael Anthony Northrup, hoping to provide him with the guidance he lacks. However, Lucas's efforts are complicated when the young man’s outlaw father arrives in town, intent on forcing his son to choose between a life of crime and the honest path Lucas has offered

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E7 - Lucas And A Rich Man Teach The Town Bully A Lesson
programme.desc: When a notorious and wealthy gunfighter arrives in North Fork, he intimidates the townspeople with his reputation and arrogance. Seeking to end the bully's reign of terror, Lucas McCain joins forces with an unlikely ally to humble the gunman and prove that intimidation cannot override the strength of a united community

programme.title: Wagon Train: Season 2, Episode 35:The Molly Kincaid Story
programme.desc: A young woman joins the wagon train, fleeing a traumatic past in search of a new beginning. As she navigates the challenges of the trail, she finds herself drawn to a fellow traveler, but her efforts to start over are threatened when a figure from her former life catches up to her, forcing a desperate confrontation

programme.title: The Brothers O'Toole 1973
programme.desc: In The Brothers O’Toole, Tim Conway and John Astin star in a rollicking Western comedy of mistaken identity and small-town chaos. When two lookalike drifters stumble into a struggling frontier town, one is hailed as a hero while the other is branded an outlaw. Their misadventures set off a whirlwind of mix-ups, scams, and slapstick mayhem. With sharp wit, lively performances, and a playful twist on Western tradition, this offbeat comedy delivers laughs as big as the open range.

programme.title: Jesse and Lester 1972
programme.desc: In Jesse and Lester, Gianni Garko and Aldo Sambrell star in a Spaghetti Western with a comedic twist. When rough-and-tumble gunman Jesse teams up with mild-mannered preacher Lester, the unlikely duo sets out to claim an inheritance that could change their lives. But standing in their way are outlaws, double-crosses, and plenty of misadventures on the trail. Blending sharp humor, action, and classic Western style, this buddy adventure proves that opposites can make the wildest partners.

programme.title: Heldorado
programme.desc: Heldorado is an annual parade celebrating Las Vegas as a frontier town. Roy is captain of the guards at Boulder Dam. He helps celebrate the town's anniversary while capturing racketeers involved with the local casinos.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher G. W. McLintock uses his power and influence in the territory to keep the peace between farmers, ranchers, land-grabbers, Indians and corrupt government officials

programme.title: This Man Can't Die
programme.desc: Bounty hunter Martin Benson seeks the leader of a vicious outlaw smuggler gang who killed his parents and raped his sister, while his other siblings hide a wounded gang member in hopes of more info and try to help.

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy: The Mystery of Maura Murray

programme.title: Ballin' in Baltimore: Expert Photographer Devin Allen Shows Angel Baltimore Through His Lens
programme.desc: Angel captures a different angle on Baltimore with activist and photojournalist, Devin Allen. They explore street photography, pop wheelies with a cutting-edge community dirt biking program and enjoy Charm City's most decadent treats.
